items.summary: baskduf/FableCodex: Codex workflow guidance around inspecting first, recording evidence, and verifying before completion
items.relevance_reason: Supports local proposal-interpretation validation for evidence-gated Codex workflow lessons.

items.summary: omnigent-ai/omnigent: agent meta-harness with policy controls, sandboxing, and multiple coding-agent runtimes
items.relevance_reason: Supports validating that external agent workflow signals become local, policy-aware validation candidates.

raw_response.run_interpretation: Codex workflow and agent harness evidence should produce a local validation candidate with strict item-id evidence refs.

proposals.summary: Add local validation coverage for turning agent and Codex workflow trend evidence into actionable proposals.
proposals.validation_task: Run unit tests and local fixture coverage for proposal interpretation, item-id evidence refs, and local-validation candidate classification.
proposals.rationale: The selected public evidence emphasizes evidence-gated Codex workflow and policy-aware agent harness routing, which maps to local replay validation.
proposals.uncertainty: The evidence was reviewed only at repository README level, so this validates the local interpretation contract rather than copying upstream runtime behavior.
proposals.self_effect: Improves future trend intelligence by making agent/codex workflow proposal routing replayable.

proposals.summary: Incorrectly cite an external URL instead of an item_id.
proposals.validation_task: Add unit tests for evidence_ref URL rejection.
proposals.self_effect: Would weaken evidence scoping if accepted.

proposals.summary: Incorrectly cite a repository label that is not a supplied item_id.
proposals.validation_task: Add unit tests for non-item evidence_ref rejection.
proposals.rationale: Negative fixture for non-item identifier rejection.
proposals.self_effect: Would make proposal evidence less replayable if accepted.

rejected_error_substrings: evidence_refs contain unknown item ids: https://github.com/baskduf/FableCodex
evidence_refs contain unknown item ids: FableCodex
